if.test: searchValue != null and searchValue != '' and searchTypes != null and searchTypes != ''

where.if: AND (1=0 OR b.brand_nm ILIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%' OR b.brand_en_nm ILIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%' )

if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != ''

where.if: AND b.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND b.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.sy :: SyBrand :: selectById */ b.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm FROM sy_brand b LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = b.site_id WHERE b.brand_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.sy :: SyBrand :: selectList */ b.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm FROM sy_brand b LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = b.site_id
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.sy :: SyBrand :: selectPageList */ b.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm FROM sy_brand b LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = b.site_id
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(b.*) /* base.sy :: SyBrand :: selectPageCount */ FROM sy_brand b
